sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports right upper quadrant tenderness and chills. He reports taking sumatriptan occasionally for breakthrough migraine pain. The patient is taking sumatriptan as needed.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: A grade 3 systolic ejection murmur is heard. Blood pressure is mildly low.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are concerning for possible infection and gallbladder issues. A Murphys sign is equivocal.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor ordered a complete blood count. A refill of lisinopril is requested. Follow-up is scheduled.
